folio.label: 157r
folio.l: Vp swal and seide , o hebrayk peeple allas
Is this to ©ow a thyngö , that is honest
That swicú a boy , shal walken as hi~ lest
In ©oure despit , and synge of swicú sentence
Whicú is a geyns , oure lawes reuäence
¢ Fro thens fortú , the Iewes han conspired
This Innocent , out of this world to chace
An homycyde , ther to han they hyred
That in an aleye , had a pryue place
And as the child , gan forby for to pace
This cursed Iew , hiö hente , and helde hiö fast
And kyt his throte , and in a pyt hi~ cast
¢ I seye that in a wardrope , they hiö threwe
Where as theise Iewes , purgen here entraille
O cursed folk , of herodes al newe
What may ©oure euele entent , ©ow a vaille
Mordre wol out , certeyn it wol nat faille
And namely there , as the honoå , of god , shal sprede
The blod out crietú , on ©oure cursed dede
¢ O martir souded , to virginite
Now maistow syngen , & folwen euäe in oon
The white lamb , celestial quod she
Of whicú the gret Ewangelist , Seynt Ioún
In pathmos wrot , whicú seitú , that they that gon
Biforn~ this lamb , & synge a songö al newe
That neuäe flesshly , wo~men they ne knewe
¢ This pouäe wydewe , a waitetú al that nygút
After hire litel child , but he cam nougút
For whicú as sone , as it was dayes ligút
Witú face pale of drede , and bisy thougút
She hatú atte scole , and elles where hi~ sougút
Til finaly , she gan so fer a spie
That he last seyn was , in the Iuerie
¢ Witú modres pitee , in hire brest enclosed
She gootú , as she were half , out of hire mynde
To euäy place , where she hatú supposed
By lyklied , hire litel child to fynde
And euäe on cristes moder , meke and kynde
She criede , and at the laste thus she wrougúte
A monges the cursed Iewes , she hi~ sougúte
¢ She freynetú , and she preyetú , pitously
To euäy Iew , that dwelled in thilke place
To telle hire if hire child , went ougút for by
They seiden nay , but Iúu of his grace
